items.description: Light on the wallet, not on the flavor.

items.name: BACON JALAPEÑO LITTLE DIPPERS
items.description: The ultimate high-intensity sidekick to your personal pie. We’ve taken our signature dough and sized it down into light, snackable bites packed with savory bacon and the bold, decisive kick of fresh jalapeños. Each bite features a crispy golden edge and a fluffy center that balances heat with the perfect savory crunch. Paired with a classic tomato dipping sauce, they deliver a powerful hit of flavor that refuses to be ignored. At just $3 when added to any full pie with promo code “LD3”, it’s the no-compromise move to round out your flavor canvas.

items.name: CYO SALAD
items.description: Your salad, your rules. Start with a fresh base of crisp lettuce, then choose your favorite toppings from a wide selection of vibrant veggies, savory proteins, and flavorful cheeses. Finish it off with your choice of dressing for a perfect, personalized creation every time. It’s the ultimate way to build the fresh, delicious salad you’re craving.

items.name: Protein Pie – Craft Your Own
items.description: Reimagine comfort food with our fully customizable Protein Pie, designed to put you in the driver’s seat of your nutrition. Start with our wholesome, high-protein base and build your masterpiece from a curated selection of GLP-1 friendly ingredients that prioritize satiety and muscle maintenance. Whether you stack it with savory lean meats or a harvest of nutrient-dense vegetables, you get a warm, satisfying meal tailored specifically to your palate.

items.name: Protein Salad
items.description: Make every bite count with a bowl designed to prioritize nutrient density and muscle maintenance. We anchor this salad with fiber-rich zesty chickpeas and a double serving of grilled chicken, delivering maximum flavor without the heavy after-effect. The experience is elevated by the crunch of roasted corn and pickled red onions, all balanced by the richness of creamy goat cheese. Finished with a decadent dual drizzle of basil pesto and fig balsamic, it’s the high-protein fuel your body needs with the gourmet flavor you crave.

items.name: STUFFED CRUST
items.description: Your pie just got a promotion. We take our signature dough and stuff the edges with a creamy, full-flavored mozzarella core, then bake it to a golden, cheesy ring of glory. Right out of the oven, it gets brushed with our next-level garlic butter sauce for an unapologetically indulgent finish. The only choice you have to make is which side to bite first.

items.name: THE FARMERS DAUGHTER
items.description: She’s baaaaaack! The Farmer’s Daughter returns with fresh mozzarella, spinach, Italian sausage, and a fried egg on top. A drizzle of hot honey adds just the right amount of heat to this hoedown throwdown on a pizza—and that’s why we love her.

items.name: THE FARMERS OTHER DAUGHTER
items.description: She’s got a sister! Introducing the Farmer’s Other Daughter, featuring a rich parm-romano sauce, fresh mozzarella, and sautéed spinach. Topped with savory grilled onions, crispy bacon, and a perfectly fried *egg, this pie is finished with a drizzle of garlic butter and a touch of hot honey. It’s a delicious twist that will make you fall in love all over again!
